title: Overland with Kit Carson
writer: Joseph F. Poland, Morgan Cox, Ned Dandy
actors: Bill Elliott, Iris Meredith, Richard Fiske
plot: A mysterious outlaw known as Pegleg dreams of an empire in the vast, rich wilderness west of the Mississippi River. Army Lieurenant David Brent (Richard Fiske) is sent from Washington to persuade Kit Carson (Bill Elliott) to put a...
